genericCommandName.title: Generic command name
genericCommandName.description: Usage: !translate es hello. The add-on reads this from normalized public chat; no separate Streamer.bot command is required.

languageCommands.title: Enabled language-code commands
languageCommands.description: Example: es enables !es text. One code per line; no separate Streamer.bot command is required.

sourceLanguage.title: Language viewers are translating from
sourceLanguage.description: MyMemory requires an explicit source language and does not support autodetect. Use a two- or three-letter language code such as en, es, fr, de, or pt.

tutorialMessage.title: Help shown when text is missing
tutorialMessage.default: Usage: !{targetLanguage} text or !translate {targetLanguage} text. On Twitch, you can also reply to a message with !{targetLanguage}.

responseTemplate.title: Translation response
responseTemplate.description: Tokens: {author}, {targetLanguage}, {translation}. Reply translation keeps the original Twitch author's display name.

errorMessage.title: Provider failure message
errorMessage.default: Translation is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.

maximumPendingRequests.title: Maximum requests waiting for a response
